ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the league is held */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the league */,
  "league_category" TEXT /* Category of the league (e.g., top tier, second tier) */,
  "league_level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_leagues" (
  "country_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-league mapping */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "primary_league" INTEGER /* Indicator for the primary league of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_leagues_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_leagues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league URL */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "league_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., official website, Wikipedia, Facebook) */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_urls_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the league category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the category */,
  "category_level" INTEGER /* Level of the league category (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighting factor */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of weighting (e.g., position, team name, form, goal difference) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the weighting factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the weighting factor */,
  "weight_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the weighting type */,
  "value_range" TEXT /* Range of values for the weighting factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_winrates" (
  "winrate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each win rate */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor on which the win rate is based (e.g., position, team name, form, goal difference) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the win rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the win rate */,
  "winrate_type" TEXT /* Type of win rate (e.g., home, away, overall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winrate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_winrates_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the access type */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
